description: Web-based PS5 management dashboard - launch games, cheats, install homebrew and PKGs, file transfer, fan control, and offline account activation. Self-contained with bundled Lapy JB Daemon (no etaHEN needed). WebUI on port 6969.

changelog: **Root cause**: `fanThreshold`/`fanTarget` were defined in `App` but never passed as props to the `Settings` component — every toggle call was `/api/fan/set?temp=undefined`, and the toggle silently did nothing. Fixed.
Disabling fan override now persists across Arsenal restarts — `/api/fan/unpin` now calls `config_save()` so `fan_threshold=0` is written to disk.
Fan watcher already re-applies the pinned threshold every 15 s to fight the firmware's automatic reset on game launch (was always there, now actually reachable).
`config.ini` had been silently corrupting itself in a loop:
`stringifyINI` turned flat C keys (`fan_threshold=0`) into character-indexed INI sections (`[fan_threshold] / 0=4 / 1=0`).
`config_preserve_ui_sections` faithfully re-copied every section it found — including the garbage ones.
Repeat forever.
Both sides fixed:
**`stringifyINI`** now writes root-level primitives (flat C-backend keys) as verbatim `key=value` lines before emitting any `[Section]` blocks.

**`config_preserve_ui_sections`** switched from deny-list to **allow-list** — only `[Settings]`, `[Sentinel]`, `[Experimental]`, `[CustomPaths]`, `[Blacklist]`, `[AutoPayloads]`, `[PKG]` are preserved. Garbage sections and the legacy `[FanControl]` block are silently dropped on every save.
**PS5 browser loads ~50× faster** — JSX + Tailwind precompiled at build time. 547 KB inline HTML → 11 KB shell + separately cached 519 KB `app.js`.
**Mobile layout** — clean responsive layout on phones (iOS Safari, Android Chrome): bottom nav, 2-column portrait grid, proper touch targets. Desktop unchanged.
**Mobile game cards** — info/favorites/hide quick-action buttons on phones. Hidden on PS5 and desktop.
**FW 12 execute-only page fix** — `mprotect()` before `pt_copyout()` makes SHN/MC4 cheats work on FW 8.40+ including FW 12.
Full in-browser file manager under the **Files** tab — browse, copy, move, delete across `/data`, `/user`, `/system_data`, USB/ext.
**NomadicDNS (`62.210.38.117`) is retired and no longer works.** Use `127.0.0.1` (nanoDNS, bundled, on by default).
**Network not connecting after JB?** Wait for Arsenal to start, then **Settings → Network → turn off then on**.
nc -q0 <PS5_IP> 9021 < elf-arsenal.elf
**FW Spoof fix**: payload now applies the version you enter (e.g. `9.60`) — previously hardcoded `99.99` and ignored your input
**klogsrv visibility**: fw-spoof output now goes to stderr and appears in the klog viewer
**UI clarification**: `ps4_sdk_version` and `upd_version` are patched (games/update checks); PS5 Settings "System Software" reads a separate sysctl and is unaffected
**DPI fix from v1.6.5** still applies (10.xx/11.xx authid + timing)

**Root cause:** DPI v1 calls `sceAppInstUtilInitialize()` at startup before kstuff has launched and patched the kernel. The 10-second timeout fired first → `init_rc = -0xDEAD` → all installs silently failed. On FW 11.00+, `SYSTEM_AUTHID` is also required and was never set on the spawned DPI process.
**Fixes:**
DPI v1: 25 s startup sleep so kstuff is ready before AppInstUtil init
DPI v1: lazy retry on each failed install request (catches late IPMI)
DPI v1 + v2: Arsenal now calls `jb_escalate_pid()` after spawning DPI (same pattern as CheatRunner) — grants `SYSTEM_AUTHID` for FW 11.xx+
DPI v2: bind retry with backoff instead of silent immediate exit
Both: diagnostic stderr logs now visible in klogsrv
**Previous releases also in this build:**
fw-spoof 10.xx KP fix (8-byte needle + scan limit)
Toggle toasts fixed (lapyjb/CheatRunner/FPKGGuard/DPIv2)

**Cheat game list fix**: After a full repo download, the staged-cheat game list was always empty because `list_cheats()` only scanned the flat root — all downloaded files live in `json/`/`shn/`/`mc4/` subdirs. Now scans all four paths; 3000+ titles correctly appear.

**Format selector tabs**: When multiple formats exist for a game (e.g. SHN + MC4), tab buttons appear above the cheat list so you can pick which version to load. Example: Dead Space SHN → 1 cheat, MC4 → 10 cheats. Tabs are hidden for single-format games.
Global toggle + per-patch enable/disable across all three CheatRunner scan dirs
Upload new XML patch files from the browser
Source badges (Arsenal / CheatRunner / CheatRunner PS5)
Drop `.elf` files into `/data/elf-arsenal/plugins/` and manage them from Settings
DPI v2 (etaHEN-compatible HTTP installer on port 12800) bundled
Switch between DPI v1 (loopback :9040) and DPI v2 (HTTP :12800) from Settings → PKG Installer → DPI version
Mutual exclusion: switching version SIGKILLs the old daemon before starting the new one
DPI version choice persists across reboots via config.ini
Accurate DPI status badge (v1/v2/not running)
i18n on all pages + full Google Translate language list

**FPKG Guard now optional** — off by default; toggle it on in Settings → FPKG Guard. When disabled, the /fpkg-guard page shows a friendly "enable in Settings" message. Auto-relocks after 10 min of no install activity.
**Storage gauges** — main page temperature card now shows Internal SSD, M.2, and USB used/free bars with color-coded fill. Sensors page has a full Storage section.
**fpkg-guard daemon** — standalone embedded ELF that auto-protects PS4 CUSA folders (0555 lock), auto-snapshots app.db/appinfo.db, and sweeps orphaned move-sources.
**FW spoof** — Patches reported system version to 99.99 via kernel data write (non-persistent; needs kstuff). Credit: Ms. Illusony (ps5-fw-spoof).
**kmonitor FW 12.70** — sysentvec offsets added; kstuff enable/disable works on 12.70.
**Cheat engine** — master toggle, FTP instructions, staged cheat browser, and live per-cheat toggles restored to the Settings UI.
**Sensors page** — live temperature/clock/fan/storage data at a glance.
**i18n / Google Translate** — full language list on all pages; game names preserved as-is from PS5 DB.
**Supporters** — 🙏 thank-you modal with donor names (Jordy, zecoxao, egycnq, BeLegal, StonedModder, trueicecold, hotshotz, Br0ken4life, Viktorious).
**Donation wallets** — BTC, USDC (SPL/SOL), USDT (BNB), Ethereum, XMR/MON.

Auto-cut for the offline pack zip. See commit 842119f. Pack contains: kstuff (3 sources), SMP 1.6test11, Linux loader v2.1, Y2JB autoloader, tile pkg, OffAct+PKGInstall, 3 cheat repos, manifest. FTP the zip to /data/elf-arsenal-offline-pack.zip then Settings -> Offline pack -> Extract now.
First Elf Arsenal release.
Rebrand from Sonic Loader
Baked-in PS5 Linux loader (v2.1) for first-boot install on FW ≤ 6.02
np-fake-signout payload (preserves username + accountId)
Background-services JSON fix (toggles hit /api/state now)
Trophy UDS daemon defaults to OFF; legacy launcher-patch defaults ON
Auto-apply patches nested into the Cheat engine settings section
nanoDNS gate on every boot-time HTTP poller
One-shot sonic-loader.elf -> elf-arsenal.elf migration for upgrading users
SDK update to v0.39 (clang 19.1.7)
